title: Postgres Connection Pool Exhausted
description: Fatal error: Remaining connection slots are reserved for non-replication superuser connections. High API latency observed.

title: JWT Token Signature Verification Failure
description: User login dropping with error 'InvalidSignatureError' across all microservices post key-rotation deployment.

title: Disk Space Low on K8s Node worker-03
description: Alert: Root filesystem volume /dev/sda1 utilization has exceeded 92% capacity threshold on production cluster.

title: Kafka Consumer Group Rebalance Loop
description: Kafka consumer group 'order-processor-group' constantly rebalancing causing severe ingestion lag spikes.

title: Redis Cache Out of Memory
description: OOM Command not allowed when used memory > 'maxmemory' configuration setting on production session store.

title: DNS Resolution Timeout in VPC Internal
description: Internal microservices experiencing Intermittent 504 Gateway Timeouts due to CoreDNS resolution degradation.

title: MFA SMS Gateway API Timeout
description: Multi-factor authentication codes failing to deliver to mobile networks. Gateway API returning 504 timeout codes.

title: Memory Leak in Payment Processing Service
description: Pod heap allocations steadily climbing without garbage collection cycles. OOMKilled event triggered.

title: Airflow Dag Run Timeout Error
description: Daily financial settlement ETL job killed programmatically after violating max_active_runs execution timeout limit.

title: Stale Database Read Replicas Lag
description: Asynchronous replication lag between primary master write cluster and read node replicas has exceeded 300 seconds.

title: SSL Certificate Expiry Warning
description: Production wildcard certificate for domain api.company.com expires within 48 hours. Renewal Cron job failing.

title: NullPointerException in Shopping Cart Checkout
description: Uncaught fatal exception on product inventory check function when cart array contains null references.

title: Kubernetes Ingress Controller Nginx Crash
description: Ingress nginx controller pods entering CrashLoopBackOff state due to malformed upstream routing configurations.

title: Deadlock Detected in Order Transaction Table
description: Process transaction ID 40582 blocked on lock share tables by concurrent update rows execution.

title: S3 Object Storage Upload Permissions Denied
description: AWS AccessDenied exception raised on archival backup bucket sync. IAM permissions mismatch on batch storage roles.
